methodology: Articles sourced from Virginia-specific RSS feeds and Google News RSS, filtered for AI/technology/workforce relevance, then assessed by Claude against the scenario framework. Each article is tagged with the region it most affects and the scenario it signals toward.

signals.title: New partnership between VCU and AI Ready RVA aims to boost AI education, innovation and community impact - VCU News
signals.signal_reading: VCU's partnership with AI Ready RVA to boost community-wide AI education signals intentional knowledge distribution beyond elite institutions, creating peer learning infrastructure that could spread deep capability across Richmond's broader population.

signals.title: ODU and Google launch AI incubator to boost innovation in Hampton Roads - 13newsnow.com
signals.signal_reading: ODU-Google AI incubator concentrates deep technical capability in Hampton Roads through institutional partnership, but platform dependency on Google suggests this may build shallow adoption rather than indigenous AI expertise that can spread organically.

signals.title: EPA grant backs community-driven workforce training in Southwest Virginia - Virginia Tech News
signals.signal_reading: EPA-funded community-driven workforce training in Southwest Virginia represents distributed capacity-building in a historically underserved region, potentially seeding peer networks that could enable bottom-up AI fluency beyond traditional tech corridors.

signals.title: NVTC Spotlights Region's AI Trailblazers: Meet the 2026 AI50 - PR Newswire
signals.signal_reading: NVTC's AI50 trailblazers showcase reinforces NoVA's concentration of deep AI talent and innovation, creating visibility for metro excellence while potentially widening the recognition and resource gap with regions lacking comparable institutional density.

signals.title: Tech Briefs: Grant money flows to 3D manufacturing in Southwest, Southside
signals.signal_reading: Grant funding for 3D manufacturing in Southwest and Southside signals technical capability distribution to non-metro regions, building hands-on advanced manufacturing skills that could create foundation for deeper AI integration in production environments.
